verse.name: v1
verse.lines: /: This is a great day That the LORD has made This is a great day That we celebrate This is a great day That the LORD has made I will rejoice and be glad :/

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: This is a great day the Spirit is moving This is a great day a season to rejoice This is a great day and we have a reason To celebrate the presence of the LORD

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: This is a great day of joy and jubilation This is a great day to sing in one accord This is a great day to shout halleluja To celebrate the presence of the LORD
